 2. Do you know who owns your GP clinic? The answer might surprise you 
    Published: 2026-03-29T18:44:33+00:00 
    Source: https://www.abc.net.au/news/2026-03-30/major-insurers-buying-up-gp-clinics-could-be-tip-of-managed-care/106491728 
    Content:Major insurers like Medibank Private and Bupa are buying up GP clinics in a move that could lead to US-style managed care.
